name: Demon Armor
overview: A cursed armor that grants bonuses but comes with infernal limitations.

properties.ac_bonus: You gain a +1 bonus to Armor Class
properties.unarmed_damage: The armor's clawed gauntlets allow your Unarmed Strikes to deal 1d8 Slashing damage instead of the usual Bludgeoning damage
properties.unarmed_bonus: You gain a +1 bonus to the attack and damage rolls of your Unarmed Strikes

curse.donning: Once you don this cursed armor, you can't doff it unless you are targeted by a Remove Curse spell or similar magic
curse.disadvantage: While wearing the armor, you have Disadvantage on attack rolls against demons and on saving throws against their spells and special abilities
